Title: Ech0's RSS feed renders unescaped tag names and raw-HTML markdown, stored XSS against subscribers
Description:
The public RSS/Atom feed at `/rss` renders two attacker-controlled surfaces without HTML escaping. Tag names flow through `fmt.Appendf(renderedContent, "
#%s", tag.Name)` at `internal/service/common/common.go:120`, and the Markdown renderer at `internal/util/md/md.go` does not set the `html.SkipHTML` flag, so raw HTML blocks in echo content pass through unmodified. The resulting Atom `` is valid XML but contains executable `
